privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sentrifugo_env exit_interview_workflow_configuration task by confirming that the prerequisite data is synthetically generated via setup scripts. Explicitly verified the expected clearance departments ('IT & Devices', 'Facilities', 'Financial Accounts'), question categories, and exit questions match the injected '/home/ga/Desktop/exit_process_config.txt' directive.
